goal: Streamlit UI system analysis and replication strategy for DMRB Legacy app. Extract all UI patterns, design decisions, and structural logic. Deliverables: 7 structured markdown files in /analysis/ui-migration/ covering: UI architecture report, design patterns, Streamlit-to-framework mapping, critical behaviors checklist, UX gaps, frontend recommendation, migration blueprint.
